channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says 'one never knows' where negotiations will lead
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Trump appoints controversial housing official Bill Pulte as acting intel chief
item.description: President Trump announced Tuesday he is naming housing official Bill Pulte as acting director of national intelligence, replacing Tuls...

item.title: How much interest can you earn on $40,000 now? Here are 4 options to consider.
item.description: There are multiple ways to earn a big return on $40,000 now, with one option savers should avoid.

item.title: Blue Origin vows to resume New Glenn launches despite explosion
item.description: Damage to Blue Origin's lone launch pad after last week's explosion was less severe than initially feared, the company said.
